name: electrobun-react-tailwind-vite
description: Electrobun app with React, Tailwind CSS, and Vite HMR

scripts.start: bun run scripts/kill-dashboard-processes.ts && concurrently "bun run hmr" "bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_LAUNCH_CWD=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 ELECTROBUN_HMR=1 electrobun dev"
scripts.dev: bun run scripts/kill-dashboard-processes.ts && concurrently "bun run hmr" "bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_LAUNCH_CWD=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 ELECTROBUN_HMR=1 electrobun dev --watch"
scripts.web: bun run scripts/kill-dashboard-processes.ts && concurrently "bun run hmr" "bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_LAUNCH_CWD=$PWD bun src/main/web.ts"
scripts.build:canary: bun run native:build:host && vite build && electrobun build --env=canary
scripts.native:build:ghostty-vt: ROOT=$PWD; ZIG=zig; if [ -x "$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig" ]; then ZIG="$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig"; fi; cd deps/ghostty && "$ZIG" build lib-vt -Doptimize=ReleaseFast -Demit-macos-app=false -Demit-xcframework=false
scripts.native:build:host: ROOT=$PWD; ZIG=zig; if [ -x "$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig" ]; then ZIG="$ROOT/.tools/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig"; fi; cd src/native && "$ZIG" build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
scripts.release:portable: bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 bunx vite build && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 bunx electrobun build --env=canary
scripts.release:stable: bun run native:build:host && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 bunx vite build && GHOSTTY_DASHBOARD_ROOT=$PWD WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 LIBGL_ALWAYS_SOFTWARE=1 bunx electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.test:avatar:codex:long-song:screenshot: bun run scripts/agent-avatar-screenshot.ts --app=codex --prompt="write a very long song with many verses about terminals, rain, and midnight debugging; keep going for at least 20 lines" --working-wait-ms=45000 --out=screenshots/codex-avatar-long-song-working.png
scripts.test:avatar:codex:bottom-working:screens: bun run scripts/agent-avatar-screenshot.ts --app=codex --prompt="write a very long song with many verses about terminals, rain, and midnight debugging; keep going for at least 60 lines" --window-width=1000 --window-height=560 --working-wait-ms=45000 --post-working-wait-ms=5000 --out=screenshots/codex-avatar-bottom-working.png
